title: Trajectory, Tool Selection, Arguments, Effects, and Stop Evaluation · Language Clinic: Effect Outcome Evidence
summary: A final answer looks right even though the agent called an unauthorized tool, used wrong arguments, retried a write, skipped an approval, and never reached a valid terminal state. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the effect outcome evidence increment in trajectory-aware agent evaluation harness. Learners progress through prediction,…
objectives: Verify actual state changes, idempotency, approvals, receipts, cleanup, compensation, and affected-user outcomes rather than call syntax alone.
Measure required-tool recall, tool precision, unnecessary calls, forbidden calls, schema validity, argument correctness, and result use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-effect-outcome-evidence — Verify actual state changes, idempotency, approvals, receipts, cleanup, compensation, and affected-user outcomes rather than call syntax alone.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-trajectory-tool-evals-3
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-trajectory-tool-evals-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def worked_agentpy_trajectory_tool_evals_3(trajectories: int = 48, valid_trajectories: int = 39, invalid_trajectories: int = 9, correlated_effects: int = 48, hidden_steps: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorityworked3",
        "interaction5798",
        "tool3dekrow",
        "stateworked35798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if trajectories < 20 or valid_trajectories < 0 or invalid_trajectories < 0:
        return False, trajectories, "trajectory-depth"
    if valid_trajectories + invalid_trajectories != trajectories:
        return False, valid_trajectories, "trajectory-reconciliation"
    if correlated_effects != trajectories:
        return False, correlated_effects, "effect-correlation"
    if hidden_steps > 0:
        return False, hidden_steps, "trajectory-observability"
    assert valid_trajectories + invalid_trajectories == trajectories and hidden_steps == 0
    return True, valid_trajectories, "trajectory-aware-agent-evals"
content.caption: Runnable deterministic fixed-fixture pure-Python agent decision model; trace one accepted and one rejected model, interaction, schema, tool, authority, state, approval, memory, evaluation, security, telemetry, sandbox, deployment, or recovery case, then state which provider, Gemini, google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, identity, storage, browser, accessibility, privacy, load, cost, or production claim still needs controlled transfer evidence.
